heading: Alert Conditions
body:
When you configure alerts, you specify alert conditions and thresholds.
Review the possible [alert conditions](alert-conditions) for
which you can trigger alerts related to your clusters.

> **Note:** Free clusters and Flex clusters only trigger alerts related
> to the metrics supported by those clusters. For complete documentation
> on Free clusters and Flex clusters alert and metric limitations, see
> [M0 Cluster Limits](atlas-free-tier), and [Atlas Flex Limitations](flex-cluster-limitations).
